0.Title:
When Zhu Yuan consumes a total of 12 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>, she receives the <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Afterglow</color> effect, and the Energy cost of the next <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> is reduced by 30.
Launching an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> will consume <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Afterglow</color> and shoot an additional 4-bullet Ether Buckshot.
Each extra bullet deals DMG equal to 220% of Zhu Yuan's ATK.
0.Lore: When Zhu Yuan consumes a total of 12 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>, she receives the <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Afterglow</color> effect, and the Energy cost of the next <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> is reduced by 30. Launching an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> will consume <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Afterglow</color> and shoot an additional 4-bullet Ether Buckshot. Each extra bullet deals DMG equal to 220% of Zhu Yuan's ATK.

DescriptionByLevel.1: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>20%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>20%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
DescriptionByLevel.2: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>23.3%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>23.3%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
DescriptionByLevel.3: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>26.6%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>26.6%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
DescriptionByLevel.4: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>30%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>30%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
DescriptionByLevel.5: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>33.3%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>33.3%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
DescriptionByLevel.6: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>36.6%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>36.6%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
DescriptionByLevel.7: When Zhu Yuan is under <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, using <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> increases her DMG by <color=#2BAD00>40%</color>. When attacking Stunned enemies, this DMG buff is increased by an additional <color=#2BAD00>40%</color>. When Zhu Yuan enters the battlefield, she immediately gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.

MathSkill.Title: Additional Ability: Tactical Coordination
MathSkill.Description:
When another character in your squad is a <color=#FFFFFF>Support</color> character or shares the same Faction:
Zhu Yuan's CRIT Rate is increased by 30% for 10s after using an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>, or <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color>.

124100001.Title: Basic Attack: Don't Move!
124100001.Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>[Assault Mode]</color>
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate.
Unleash a flurry of martial arts, bullets, and Ether Buckshots in a series of up to 5 attacks, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color> and <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
When the 4th or 5th hit strikes an enemy, obtain 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshell</color> per hit. A max of 1 can be obtained per activation of this Basic Attack.
While using this skill, drag the {LAYOUT_CONSOLECONTROLLER#stick}{LAYOUT_FALLBACK#joystick} and press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate <color=#FFFFFF>Dash Attack: Firepower Offensive</color> and readjust to face the selected direction.
While under <color=#FFFFFF>Assault Mode</color>, hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to switch to <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>.

124100002.Title: Basic Attack: Please Do Not Resist
124100002.Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>[Suppressive Mode]</color>
Hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Unleash up to 3 Shotshell piercing attacks, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>. If Zhu Yuan has <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> upon firing, 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshell</color> will be consumed, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
While using this skill, drag the {LAYOUT_CONSOLECONTROLLER#stick}{LAYOUT_FALLBACK#joystick} to activate her <color=#FFFFFF>Dash Attack: Overwhelming Firepower</color> and readjust to face the selected direction.
While in <color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>, release <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to return to <color=#FFFFFF>Assault Mode</color>.

124110012.Title: Basic Attack: Please Do Not Resist

124100003.Title: Special Attack: Buckshot Blast
124100003.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Shoots Ether Buckshots that deal <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>. This can be repeated 3 times by repeatedly pressing <IconMap:Icon_Special>.
Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

124100004.Title: EX Special Attack: Full Barrage
124100004.Description:
With enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Shoots a series of Ether Buckshots, that explode and deal massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
Upon activation, gain 3 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100005.Title: Dodge: Tactical Detour
124100005.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100006.Title: Dash Attack: Firepower Offensive
124100006.Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Assault Mode</color>
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Uses handgun to attack, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.

124100007.Title: Dash Attack: Overwhelming Firepower
124100007.Description:
<color=#FFFFFF>Suppressive Mode</color>
Drag the {LAYOUT_CONSOLECONTROLLER#stick}{LAYOUT_FALLBACK#joystick} during <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack: Please Do Not Resist</color> to activate:
Unleashes a Shotshell piercing attack, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>. If Zhu Yuan has <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color> when firing, 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshell</color> will be consumed, dealing massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.

124100008.Title: Dodge Counter: Fire Blast
124100008.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate.
Shoots enemies in front with an Ether Buckshot, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
Gain 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshell</color> on skill use.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100009.Title: Chain Attack: Eradication Mode
124100009.Description:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Uses Modified Master Firearm to execute a saturated attack, firing lasers and seeking missiles to deal massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
Upon activation, gain 3 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100010.Title: Ultimate: Max Eradication Mode
124100010.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at <color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> to activate:
Uses Modified Master Firearm to execute a saturated attack, firing lasers and seeking missiles to deal massive <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
Upon activation, gain 3 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100012.Title: Quick Assist: Covering Shot
124100012.Description:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Shoots enemies in front with an Ether Buckshot, dealing <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
Gain 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshell</color> on skill use.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100013.Title: Evasive Assist: Guarded Backup
124100013.Description:
When the character on field is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Dodges the enemy's attack and activates <color=#FFFFFF>Vital View</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

124100014.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Defensive Counter
124100014.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after an <color=#FFFFFF>Evasive Assist</color> to activate:
Attack with a combination of martial arts and shotshells, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color> and <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>.
Upon activation, gain 3 <color=#FFFFFF>Enhanced Shotshells</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.
